data.content: Implementation complete for all child slices. Branch: codex/2a4d-stale-grooming-refine. Commit: 69047617, now also pushed to origin/main. Shipped children: foolery-2ee2 dispatch/API, foolery-79f2 overview dialog UX, foolery-d57e diagnostics. Verification passed locally: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Built-in browser review passed for overview dialog/default viewport and diagnostics runtime card. Remote workflows on main passed: CI 25326058790 and Coverage Badge 25326058791.
